description: Create a corporate hierarchy consisting of one parent organization and two regional subsidiaries correctly linked using the 'Member Of' relationship, and assign a newly created contact to the parent company. Create the parent organization 'Apex Global Holdings' (Industry: Finance, Annual Revenue: 150000000). Create two subsidiary organizations, 'Apex Global - North America' and 'Apex Global - EMEA' (both Industry: Technology), and link them to 'Apex Global Holdings' as the parent. Finally, create a contact named Elias Vance (Title: VP of Global Procurement) and associate them with 'Apex Global Holdings'.
